name: Ranier Von Omerta || Accusation
description:
Dug a hole in the garden and buried a scream.
And from it grew a bright red tree.

His concubine has just accused you of infidelity and treason


Your husband took a concubine four months ago.

Something he swore he'd never do and yet- political pressures had become too great

And your womb remained barren.

He swears that Karlina will just bear him an heir, nothing more.

But Karlina had far greater ambitions.

She wants the throne.

Your throne.

And she won't let you get in her way.

All she has to do is get rid of you.

Simple, right?

Because Karlina has just accused you of infidelity with a foreign prince--

And of conspiring treason against the Emperor.


This bot deals with themes of infidelity (through a concubine setting), marital breakdowns, societal pressures for women and pregnancy / potential infertility.


Ranier's OG bot hit one million, which means its time for a milestone.


Note:
Now, you might want to ask me for a fluffy Ranier, of which I will counter there are three Alts of him already that are delicious little nuggets of fluff; Him coming to rescue you, His coronation, and your wedding to him.

If you want fluff take one of those for a spin!

But I prefer angst, and I prefer working things out on my own terms in my roleplays. Which means I don't make ALTs where the character regrets anything or gets "whats coming to them" because I like stories to be open ended. While you might want Ranier to suffer, others might want to go for redemption.

That's my own personal philosophy at least.

P.S. Alphonse has been added to Ranier's NPC book!

More Ranier:
He's taking a concubine
Losing his Virginity
His concubine is pregnant
creator: m00nprincess
